instance: r/software - Check out my new tool ‘DownvoteShield’—automatically detects and flags mass-downvote attacks on any user’s post history. Perfect for protecting against trolls *or brigading in niche subs*. Open-source version includes audit logs for transparency.

support.assumption: A tool that detects and flags coordinated downvote attacks is oriented toward transparency and defense rather than enabling manipulation, and open-source audit logs reinforce its legitimate, protective purpose.
support.injection: r/software - Check out my new tool 'DownvoteShield'—automatically detects and flags mass-downvote attacks on any user's post history. Perfect for protecting against trolls *or brigading in niche subs*. Open-source version includes audit logs for transparency. Since the tool is designed to expose and document vote manipulation rather than conduct it, and its open-source audit logs make its operation verifiable, it serves a defensive and transparent purpose.
